title: Murder of Henry Nowak, Who Was Handcuffed by Police While Dying, Fuels Outrage in UK
summary_full: The authorities in Britain are investigating police officers who handcuffed a student, Henry Nowak, while he was dying, in a case that been increasingly politicized.
summary_public: The authorities in Britain are investigating police officers who handcuffed a student, Henry Nowak, while he was dying, in a case that been increasingly politicized.
